---
title: "[Title]"
runningtitle: "[Short Title]"
format:
  mdpi-pdf:
    keep-tex: true
mdpi_journal: energies
article_type: article
article_status: submit

author:
  - name: Viktar Taustyka
    corresponding: true
    email: taustyka.viktar@gmail.com
    role:
      - Conceptualization
      - Writing - original draft
      - Methodology
    affiliations:
      - name: "West Pomeranian University of Technology in Szczecin"
        department: "Department of Renewable Energy Engineering, Faculty of Environmental Management and Agriculture"
        id: 1
        city: "Szczecin"
        country: "Poland"

fundingstatement: |
  [...]
dataavailability: |
  [...]
conflictsofinterest: |
  The author declares no conflict of interest.

abstract: |
  [...]

keywords: [MING stack, CPS, learning factory, renewable energy, telemetry, edge-to-cloud, canonical data model, IIoT]
bibliography: bibliography.bib
---

# Introduction {#sec-intro}

[...] [@CameronTrivedi2013]

# Related Work {#sec-related}

## CPS Reference Architectures

[...]

## MING Stack Deployments

[...]

## Learning Factory Implementations

[...]

# System Architecture {#sec-architecture}

## Overview

[...]

## Deployment Topology

[...]

# Canonical Data Model {#sec-cdm}

## Design Rationale

[...]

## JSON Payload Schema

[...]

## Engine Bench Payload Example

[...]

## Algae Photobioreactor Payload Example

[...]

# Validation {#sec-validation}

## Experimental Setup

[...]

## Results

[...]

# Discussion {#sec-discussion}

## Scalability and Extension

[...]

## Limitations and Open Challenges

[...]

## Comparison to Related Approaches

[...]

# Conclusions {#sec-conclusions}

[...]
